transcription.text: Be prepared for those hot humid nights and days ahead with this wonderful new Westinghouse room air conditioner. It keeps you so cool in summer, it freshens the air all year round and warms it in winter too. It gives you 10 different comfort zones. You just push a single button on this exclusive comfort control panel and you change the weather. What's more, this fiberglass filter cleans the air of dust and pollen. That's a wonderful comfort if you suffer from asthma or hay fever. And the Westinghouse is draft free too. We put these ribbons on here just to show you. You can turn these three grills in any direction, like this, like this. You control the flow of air so that you never feel a draft. Look for this sign, senior certified Westinghouse dealer. You can own a Westinghouse room air conditioner for as little as $3.25 a week after a small down payment. And remember, you can be sure if it's Westinghouse.
